slides.eyebrow: Histori ya Kereiti ya 5 - Kgato ya Bohareng
slides.heading: Batsomi-le-Bakgoni le Balisa Afrika e ka Boroa
slides.lead: Tsebana le Maswina (San) le Bakhoikhoi - batho ba pele ho phela Afrika e ka boroa - mme o fumane hore na ho boloka diphoofolo ho ile ha fetola tsela eo batho ba neng ba phela ka yona.

image.alt: Naha e omeletseng ya Afrika e ka boroa e nang le leralla la majwe, phoofolo ya lehodi, le letsatsi.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 320 180' role='img'><rect width='320' height='180' fill='#f4efe6'/><circle cx='258' cy='46' r='24' fill='#e8a13a'/><rect y='118' width='320' height='62' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M0 118 L60 96 L110 114 L168 86 L232 110 L320 92 L320 118 Z' fill='#7a8b5a'/><path d='M40 96 L70 60 L100 96 Z' fill='#9a7b53'/><g fill='#5c4327'><rect x='150' y='120' width='4' height='16'/><rect x='170' y='120' width='4' height='16'/><path d='M146 108 q12 -10 30 0 l0 14 -30 0 Z'/><path d='M146 108 l-8 -8 4 -1 6 6 Z'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Amohela baithuti pale ya batho ba pele ho phela Afrika e ka boroa. Hlalosa dihlopha tse pedi tse kgolo tseo ba tla di tseba: Maswina (San), ba neng ba le batsomi-le-bakgoni, le Bakhoikhoi, ba neng ba le balisa. Botsa hore na ba nahana hore 'motsomi-le-mokgoni' le 'molisa' ho ka bolela eng pele o qala. [SME] Ditlha tsa mehla ya dihlopha tsena di fanwe e le dikhakanyo tse loketseng Kereiti ya 5.

slides.heading: Ke bo mang ba phetseng mona pele?
slides.lead: Maswina (San) e ne e le batho ba pele ho phela Afrika e ka boroa, dilemo tse dikete tse ngata tse fetileng.

blocks.text: **Maswina (San)** e ne e le batho ba pele ho fela Afrika e ka boroa. Ba ne ba phela mona pele ho metse, dipolasi kapa mongolo. Nako ena e bitswa **Mehla ya Morao ya Majwe (Later Stone Age)**, hobane batho ba ne ba etsa disebediswa tsa bona ka lejwe, patsi le lesapo.

items: Maswina ha a ka a haha metse e sa fetoheng - a ne a fallela sebakeng ho ya ho se seng.
Ba ne ba iphedisa ka naha ka ho **tsoma** diphoofolo le ho **kga** dimela tsa naha.
Hamorao haholo, sehlopha se seng se bitswang Bakhoikhoi se fihla se ena le diphoofolo tsa ho lisa.

slides.notes: Beha sebaka ka kutlwisiso ya nako e telele haholo. Baithuti ba Kereiti ya 5 ba fumana 'dilemo tse dikete tse fetileng' ho le thata ho ho nahana, ka hona e bapise le bo-nkgono-moholo ba bangata haholo ba fetileng. Hlahisa lentswe 'nomadic' (ho falla-falla) le hlahang hape. Hlalosa hore re ithuta ka batho bana ka dintho tseo ba di siileng, jwaloka disebediswa le meloko ya majweng.

slides.heading: Maswina: batsomi le bakgoni
slides.lead: Maswina a ne a fumana tsohle tseo a di hlokang lefatsheng la tlhaho le a potolohileng.

blocks.text: Maswina a ne a iphedisa ka ho **tsoma** diphoofolo tsa naha tse jwaloka gemsbok le mahodi a mang, le ka ho **kga** dimela tsa naha, metso, monokotshwai le mahe a dinotshi. Hobane ba ne ba latela diphoofolo le dihla, ba ne ba fallela sebakeng ho ya ho se seng. Sena re se bitsa tsela ya bophelo ya **ho falla-falla (nomadic)**.

items: **Banna** hangata ke bona ba neng ba tsoma.
**Basadi** ba ne ba kga dimela mme ba tjheka metso ya ho ja.
Ba ne ba nka feela seo ba se hlokang, e le hore naha e tle e kgone ho fola.

image.alt: Setshwantsho sa motsomi a nang le seqha pela setshwantsho sa mosadi a tshwereng thupa ya ho tjheka le semela.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><g fill='#7a5a3a'><circle cx='70' cy='44' r='12'/><rect x='63' y='58' width='14' height='46'/><rect x='60' y='104' width='7' height='30'/><rect x='73' y='104' width='7' height='30'/></g><path d='M92 40 q22 34 0 68' fill='none' stroke='#5c4327' stroke-width='3'/><line x1='92' y1='40' x2='92' y2='108' stroke='#5c4327' stroke-width='2'/><g fill='#2f5233'><circle cx='160' cy='44' r='12'/><rect x='153' y='58' width='14' height='46'/><rect x='150' y='104' width='7' height='30'/><rect x='163' y='104' width='7' height='30'/></g><line x1='178' y1='40' x2='178' y2='120' stroke='#5c4327' stroke-width='3'/><circle cx='188' cy='70' r='6' fill='#8a1f1f'/></svg>

slides.notes: Hlalosa phapano pakeng tsa ho tsoma le ho kga, le hore tse pedi tsohle di ne di hlokahala ho phela - ho kga dimela hangata ho ne ho fana ka dijo tse tshepahalang haholo. Hlokomela ho arolwa ha mesebetsi pakeng tsa banna le basadi ntle le ho ho ahlola ka mehopolo ya kajeno. Matlafatsa tlhompho eo Maswina a neng a ena le yona ho tlhaho: a ne a sebedisa naha ka hloko e le hore e se ke ya fela.

slides.heading: Seqha le motsu o nang le chefo
slides.lead: Maswina a ile a qapa tsela e bohlale ya ho tsoma diphoofolo tse kgolo ho ba feta.

blocks.text: Maswina a ne a etsa **seqha se senyenyane le metsu**. Ba ne ba tshela **chefo** ditlhorong tsa metsu. Ka mora ho thunya phoofolo, ba ne ba e latela ka setu mehatong ya yona - ka nako tse ding matsatsi a mangata - ho fihlela chefo e e fokolisa hoo ba ka e tshwarang. Bokgoni ba ho bala mehato bo ne bo le bohlokwa haholo.

items: Chefo e ne e tswa dimeleng, dinokeng kapa diboko tsa dikokwanyana.
Batsomi ba ne ba tlameha ho atamela haholo mme ba thunye hang feela.
Ba ne ba bala mehato leheleng ho latela phoofolo.

image.alt: Seqha se nang le motsu, le mola wa mehato ya phoofolo leheleng.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M50 30 q40 50 0 100' fill='none' stroke='#5c4327' stroke-width='4'/><line x1='50' y1='30' x2='50' y2='130' stroke='#8a7050' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='42' y1='80' x2='150' y2='80' stroke='#5c4327' stroke-width='3'/><path d='M150 80 l-12 -6 0 12 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><g fill='#9a7b53'><ellipse cx='120' cy='120' rx='5' ry='7'/><ellipse cx='140' cy='128' rx='5' ry='7'/><ellipse cx='162' cy='120' rx='5' ry='7'/><ellipse cx='184' cy='128' rx='5' ry='7'/><ellipse cx='206' cy='120' rx='5' ry='7'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Selaete sena se bontsha bokgoni le tsebo ya Maswina, eseng feela ho iphedisa. Hatisa mamello le kutlwisiso e tebileng ya tlhaho e neng e hlokahala ho latela phoofolo matsatsi a mangata le ho tseba hore na ke dimela dife tse etsang chefo. Sebetsana le 'chefo' ka ho toba le ka nnete - e ne e le sesebediswa sa ho fumana dijo, eseng sa ho utlwisa batho bohloko. Botsa baithuti hore na ke hobaneng ha ho thunya hang feela ho ne ho le bohlokwa (ho itshireletsa, ho boloka metsu).

slides.eyebrow: Dintho tseo Maswina a neng a di etsa
slides.heading: Disebediswa le dintho tsa letsatsi le letsatsi tsa Maswina
slides.lead: Maswina a ne a etsa tsohle tseo a neng a ena le tsona ka dintho tseo a neng a di fumana a a potolohileng.

blocks.heading: Dithupa tsa mollo
blocks.text: Dithupa tse pedi tse pikitlanwang ho hlahisa qhwarara. Mollo o ne o fana ka mofuthu, lesedi le dijo tse phehilweng.

blocks.heading: Lekgapetla la lehe la mpshe
blocks.text: Lehe la mpshe le se nang letho le ne le sebediswa ho tshwara le ho boloka metsi, le patwa hore le lule le phodile.

blocks.heading: Thupa ya ho tjheka
blocks.text: Thupa e lootsweng e sebediswang ho tjheka metso le ditapole tsa naha ho ja.

blocks.heading: Kaross
blocks.text: Kobo ya letlalo e entsweng ka letlalo la phoofolo, e aparwang bakeng sa mofuthu le ho tshwara dintho.

slides.notes: Sebedisa dintho tsena tse nne ho etsa bophelo ba Maswina bo utlwahalang. Hlokomedisa hore tsohle di ne di le bobebe mme di ka nkwa, hobane Maswina a ne a lula a falla. Dipheta le makgapetla a mahe a mpshe le tsona di ne di sebediswa ho kgabisa mme di ne di fanwa e le dimpho ho aha setswalle pakeng tsa dihlopha. Mema baithuti ho nahana ho ba le dintho feela tseo ba ka di jarang.

slides.heading: Maswina a ne a arolelana tsohle
slides.lead: Maswina a ne a phela ka dihlopha tse nyenyane moo motho e mong le e mong a neng a lekana.

blocks.text: Maswina a ne a phela ka **dihlopha (bands)** tse ka bang batho ba 15 ho isa ho 40, hangata malapa a se makae mmoho. Ba ne ba se na **marena** mme ho ne ho se motho ya moruo kapa ya bohlokwa ho feta ba bang. Ba ne ba **arolelana** dijo tsa bona mme ba thusana. Ba ne ba dumela hore ha ho motho ya ka bang le naha - e ne e le ya hore bohle ba e sebedise.

items: Basadi ba ne ba kgona ho haha ntlwana ya jwang ka nako e ka tlase ho hora.
Bana ba ne ba ithuta ka ho bapala le ho etsisa batswadi ba bona.
Ho arolelana ho ne ho bolela hore ha ho ya lapang ha ba bang ba ena le dijo.

image.alt: Ntlwana ya jwang e sebopeho sa domo pela mollo o monyenyane wa kampo.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='120' width='240' height='40' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M40 122 a54 54 0 0 1 108 0 Z' fill='#9a8a5c'/><path d='M52 122 a42 42 0 0 1 84 0' fill='none' stroke='#7a6a3c' stroke-width='2'/><path d='M70 122 a26 26 0 0 1 48 0' fill='#5c4a24'/><g><path d='M186 122 l-8 -22 16 0 Z' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M186 122 l-14 -14 8 -4 Z' fill='#c8611f'/><path d='M186 122 l14 -14 -8 -4 Z' fill='#c8611f'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Sena ke sebaka se setle sa ho bua ka toka le setjhaba. Bapisa ka bonolo le lefatshe la kajeno moo batho ba nang le dintho. Hlalosa hore ho ba le 'marena a se yo' ho ne ho sa bolele hore ho ne ho se na melao - sehlopha se ne se etsa diqeto mmoho mme baholo ba ne ba hlomphuwa. Boloka moya wa tlhompho mme o qobe ho etsa bophelo ba Maswina bo utlwahale bo 'bonolo' kapa bo 'sa tswela pele'; bo ne bo lokela lefatshe la bona hantle.

slides.heading: Meloko ya majweng ya Maswina
slides.lead: Maswina a ne a taka le ho betla ditshwantsho tse dikete hodima majwe le maboteng a mahaha.

blocks.text: **Meloko ya majweng (rock art)** e bolela ditshwantsho tse takilweng kapa tse betliloweng hodima lejwe. Afrika Borwa e na le e meng ya meloko ya majweng e metle ka ho fetisisa lefatsheng, mme boholo ba yona e entswe ke Maswina. Ba ne ba taka batho le diphoofolo tse jwaloka phofu (eland), ba sebedisa mebala e entsweng ka mebala ya tlhaho. Meloko e meng ya majweng e **uKhahlamba Drakensberg** e ka ba dilemo tse 3 000.

items: Mmala o ne o entswe ka dintho tse jwaloka lejwe le lefubedu le le lesehla, mashala le madi.
**Phofu (eland)**, lehodi le leholo, e ne e takwa ho feta phoofolo efe kapa efe.
Meloko ya majweng e re thusa ho ithuta hore na Maswina a ne a phela jwang le hore na a ne a dumela eng.

image.alt: Lebota la lehaha le nang le meloko e mefubedu ka setaele sa Maswina ya phofu le ditshwantsho tsa batho ba mathang.

slides.notes: Hatisa hore meloko ya majweng ke tlaleho ya nnete e siilweng ke Maswina ka bobona - kgokahano le nako e fetileng. Bua ka bohlokwa bo ikgethang ba phofu (eland). Setshwantsho se tummeng sa Linton Panel (jwale se sescomeng) le sona se ile sa susumetsa karolo ya lets'oao la naha la Afrika Borwa (coat of arms). [SME] Dilemo tsa nnete tsa meloko ya majweng di fapana ho ya ka sebaka; 3 000 ke palo e netefaditsweng eo SAHO e e fanang bakeng sa Drakensberg, empa meloko e mengata e menyenyane mme e se kae e meholwane - netefatsa mantswe le SME.

slides.eyebrow: Ho feta ditshwantsho tse ntle feela
slides.heading: Hobaneng Maswina a ne a taka?
slides.lead: Meloko ya majweng e ne e le bohlokwa ditumelong tsa Maswina, eseng feela mokgabiso.

blocks.text: Re ke ke ra tseba ka botlalo hore na hobaneng Maswina a ne a taka, empa ditsebi tse ngata di dumela hore ditshwantsho e ne e le karolo ya **ditumelo le bophelo ba semoya** ba bona. Batho ba ikgethang ba bitswang balwetsi (healers) ba ne ba tshwara mainto ho thusa setjhaba sa bona, mme meloko e meng e ka bontsha seo ba neng ba se utlwa le ho se bona. Meloko ena e boetse e re bolella ka diphoofolo le bophelo boo Maswina a neng a bo tseba hantle.

items: Meloko e meng e ka amana le mainto a phekolo le ditoro.
E meng e ka be e entswe ho tlisa mahlohonolo bakeng sa ho tsoma.
Kajeno meloko ya majweng e sireletswa e le karolo ya lefa la Afrika Borwa.

slides.notes: Hlahisa moelelo wa semoya wa meloko ya majweng ka tlhompho le ka bonolo. Hlakisetsa baithuti hore sena ke seo ditsebi tse ngata di se nahanang, eseng nnete e netefaditsweng - bo-rahistori ba sebedisa dipontsho ho etsa dikhakanyo tse hlokolositsweng. Qoba puo e halalelang ya 'trance' le Kereiti ya 5; 'mainto a phekolo' le 'ditoro' ke ditsela tse bonolo, tse nepahetseng. Hatisa hore ho senya meloko ya majweng ho kgahlano le molao hobane ke ya bohle. [SME] Tlhaloso ya shamanistic/trance ke kgopolo e ka sehloohong ya boithuti empa e a phehisanwa - e boloke e hlaloswa e le 'ditsebi tse ngata di dumela'.

slides.heading: Balisa ba Bakhoikhoi ba a fihla
slides.lead: Hoo e ka bang dilemo tse 2 000 tse fetileng sehlopha se setjha se ile sa tlisa diphoofolo Afrika e ka boroa.

blocks.text: **Bakhoikhoi** ba ile ba kena Afrika e ka boroa ba etswa leboya hoo e ka bang **dilemo tse 2 000 tse fetileng**. Lebitso *Khoikhoi* le bolela 'batho ba nnete'. E ne e le **balisa**, ba bitswang hape **balisa ba diphoofolo (pastoralists)**, hobane ba ne ba boloka le ho hlokomela diphoofolo. Ena e ne e le tsela e ntjha ya ho phela eo Maswina a neng a e s'a e bona.

items: Balisa ba boloka diphoofolo tse **ruilweng (tse thapisitsweng)** ho ena le ho tsoma feela.
Jwaloka Maswina, Bakhoikhoi le bona ba ne ba falla-falla ho fumana makhulo.
Ba ne ba boloka dinku, dipodi le dikgomo.

image.alt: Setshwantsho sa molisa a nang le thupa a tsamaya pela dikgomo le dinku.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='122' width='240' height='38' fill='#7a8b5a'/><g fill='#5c4327'><circle cx='40' cy='52' r='11'/><rect x='34' y='64' width='12' height='40'/><rect x='31' y='104' width='6' height='24'/><rect x='43' y='104' width='6' height='24'/></g><line x1='52' y1='44' x2='52' y2='120' stroke='#8a7050' stroke-width='3'/><g fill='#8a6a44'><ellipse cx='120' cy='96' rx='26' ry='16'/><rect x='100' y='104' width='5' height='18'/><rect x='134' y='104' width='5' height='18'/><path d='M96 90 l-8 -6 8 0 Z'/></g><g fill='#e8e2d2'><ellipse cx='190' cy='104' rx='18' ry='12'/><rect x='178' y='112' width='4' height='12'/><rect x='198' y='112' width='4' height='12'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Hlahisa phetoho e kgolo ya karolo ena: ho lisa. Hlalosa 'ruilwe/thapisitswe' ka mehlala ya letsatsi le letsatsi (ntja e thapileng kapa kgomo ya polasi kgahlano le phoofolo ya naha). Hlokomela hore Bakhoikhoi le bona ba ne ba ntse ba tsoma le ho kga, empa ho boloka diphoofolo e ne e le phapano e ntjha le ya bohlokwa. [SME] Tshimoloho le tlha ya nnete ya ho fihla ha ho lisa/Bakhoikhoi Afrika e ka boroa e a phehisanwa ke bo-rasaense ba baepolli; 'dilemo tse 2 000 tse fetileng' e latela thuto ya SAHO ya Kereiti ya 5 mme ke ho nolofatsa.

slides.heading: Bophelo le mehlape ya diphoofolo
slides.lead: Bophelo bohle ba Bakhoikhoi bo ne bo theilwe hodima diphoofolo tsa bona.

blocks.text: Bakhoikhoi ba ne ba falla le mehlape ya bona ho fumana jwang bo botjha le metsi. Matlo a bona, a bitswang **matjieshuise**, a ne a entswe ka dikwere tsa lehlaka hodima dithupa tse tshesane e le hore a ka rojwa mme a jarwe mekokotlong ya diphoofolo. **Dikgomo** di ne di le tsa bohlokwa haholo. Basadi ba ne ba gama diphoofolo mme banna ba ne ba ntse ba tsomela nama.

items: Matlo le dipitsa di ne di entswe di le bobebe e le hore di be bonolo ho falla le tsona.
Boholo ba nako ba ne ba nwa **lebese** ho ena le ho bolaya dikgomo tsa bona.
Dikgomo di ne di jewa feela ka dinako tse ikgethang, jwaloka manyalo le mapato.

image.alt: Ntlo ya dikwere tsa lehlaka e sebopeho sa domo pela kgomo.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='122' width='240' height='38' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M30 122 a52 52 0 0 1 104 0 Z' fill='#cdae74'/><path d='M46 122 a36 36 0 0 1 72 0' fill='none' stroke='#a88a4c' stroke-width='2'/><path d='M64 122 a18 18 0 0 1 36 0' fill='#8a6a3c'/><line x1='30' y1='108' x2='134' y2='108' stroke='#a88a4c' stroke-width='1.5'/><line x1='40' y1='92' x2='124' y2='92' stroke='#a88a4c' stroke-width='1.5'/><g fill='#7a5a3a'><ellipse cx='188' cy='96' rx='26' ry='16'/><rect x='168' y='104' width='5' height='18'/><rect x='202' y='104' width='5' height='18'/><path d='M164 90 l-8 -6 8 0 Z'/><path d='M162 84 l-4 -8 6 4 Z'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Hlalosa bohlale ba tshebetso ba matjieshuis - ntlo eo o ka e phuthang mme wa e jara. Kgopolo ya bohlokwa ke hore dikgomo di ne di bolokwa di phela bakeng sa lebese le e le leruo, eseng haholo bakeng sa nama. Ena ke phapano e kgolo ho Maswina, ba neng ba ja diphoofolo tseo ba di tsomileng. Hlahisa lentswe 'matjieshuis' ka bonolo; ho bitswa ho batla ho le 'matchie-hoyse'.

slides.heading: Kamoo ho lisa ho ileng ha fetola setjhaba
slides.lead: Ho ba le diphoofolo ho ile ha etsa hore setjhaba sa Bakhoikhoi se fapane le setjhaba sa Maswina.

items: Ba ne ba arolelana tsohle ka ho lekana.
Ho ne ho se marena; bohle ba ne ba lekana.
Ho ne ho se motho ya nang le naha.
Ba ne ba fumana dijo ka ho tsoma le ho kga.
Diphoofolo di ne di ka **rungwa** ke motho.
Batho ba bang ba ile ba ba **barui** mme ba bang ba ba mafutsana.
Barui ba ne ba ena le **bohlokwa** le matla a maholwane.
Ba ne ba fumana dijo haholo mehlapeng ya bona.

slides.notes: Sena ke sehloohong sa potso ya CAPS 'kamoo ho lisa ho fetotseng ditjhaba'. Kgopolo e kgolo: hobane diphoofolo di ne di ka rungwa, leruo le ile la hlaha, mme le leruo ha tla diphapano tsa bohlokwa le qalo ya baetapele. Hlahisa hore sena ha se 'betere' kapa 'bobe' - ke tsela e fapaneng feela ya ho phela e hodileng ho tswa ho boloka diphoofolo. Etsa hore baithuti ba supe phapano e le nngwe kholomong ka nngwe.

slides.heading: Ho arolelana naha e le nngwe
slides.lead: Maswina le Bakhoikhoi ba ne ba phela haufi haholo, mme sena ka nako tse ding se ne se baka dikgohlano.

blocks.text: Maswina le Bakhoikhoi ba ne ba phela dibakeng tse tshwanang. Dikgomo le dinku tsa Bakhoikhoi di ne di ja jwang bo bongata, mme sena se ile sa leleka diphoofolo tsa naha tseo Maswina a neng a di tsoma. Ha Maswina a lapa, ka nako tse ding a ne a nka diphoofolo tsa Bakhoikhoi bakeng sa dijo. Sena se ile sa lebisa ho ntweng pakeng tsa dihlopha tse pedi. Empa ho boetse ho ne ho ena le **kgwebisano** le **setswalle**, mme Maswina a mang a ile a kena dihlopheng tsa Bakhoikhoi.

items: Mehlape e ne e ja jwang, kahoo diphoofolo tsa naha di ile tsa falla.
Dihlopha tse pedi ka bobedi di ne di gwebisana le ho lwana.
Mmoho ka nako tse ding di bitswa **Bakhoisan (Khoisan)**.

slides.notes: Fana ka setshwantsho se leka-lekaneng: dikamano e ne e se feela dikgohlano. Ho ne ho ena le kgwebisano, manyalo a kopanang le tshebedisano hammoho le ntwa ka ditsela. Hlalosa lentswe le kopaneng 'Khoisan'. Selaete sena se boetse se hlophisa hantle histori ya morao (ho fihla ha Madatjhe ka 1652), eo baithuti ba tla e tseba ka botlalo dikereiti tse latelang. Boloka moya wa nnete mme o qobe ho etsa hore sehlopha se seng se be 'se sebe'.

slides.heading: Pale e telele haholo

blocks.alt: Mola wa nako ho tloha ho Maswina a pele a batsomi-le-bakgoni ho isa ho fihleng ha balisa ba Bakhoikhoi.

events.label: Maswina a batsomi-le-bakgoni a phela ho pota Afrika e ka boroa
Maswina a taka meloko ya majweng Drakensberg
Balisa ba Bakhoikhoi ba fihla le diphoofolo
Maswina le Bakhoikhoi ba a gwebisana, ba arolelana naha mme ka nako tse ding ba a lwana

slides.notes: Sebedisa sena ho thusa baithuti ho hlophisa pale: batsomi-le-bakgoni pele, balisa hamorao. Ba hopotse hore ditlha tsena ke tse hakanyeditsweng, eseng tse nepahetseng - bo-rahistori ba sebedisa 'hoo e ka bang' ha ba sa kgone ho tiisa. [SME] Ditlha tsohle tse nne mona di hakanyeditswe mme di nolofaditswe bakeng sa Kereiti ya 5; netefatsa sebopeho le SME.

slides.heading: Seo re ithutileng sona
slides.lead: Maswina a ne a tsoma le ho kga mme a arolelana tsohle; Bakhoikhoi ba ne ba boloka mehlape, mme ho ba le diphoofolo ho ile ha fetola tsela eo batho ba neng ba phela ka yona.

blocks.text: **Maswina** e ne e le batho ba pele ba Afrika e ka boroa. Ba ne ba phela ka ho **tsoma le ho kga**, ba falla sebakeng ho ya ho se seng, ba arolelana tsohle, mme ba re siela **meloko ya majweng** e metle. **Bakhoikhoi** e ne e le **balisa** ba neng ba boloka diphoofolo. Hobane diphoofolo di ne di ka rungwa, batho ba bang ba ile ba ba barui ho feta ba bang - kahoo ho lisa ho ile ha fetola tsela eo setjhaba se sebetsang ka yona.

blocks.question: Bolela ditsela tse pedi tseo Maswina a neng a fumana dijo tsa bona ka tsona.
Ke phapano efe e le nngwe pakeng tsa motsomi-le-mokgoni le molisa?
Ho boloka diphoofolo ho ile ha fetola setjhaba sa Bakhoikhoi jwang? Fana ka mohlala o le mong.

slides.notes: Boela ka ditsela tse pedi tsa bophelo le kgopolo ya bohlokwa ya phetoho: ho ba le diphoofolo ho ile ha lebisa leruong le diphapanong pakeng tsa batho. Sebedisa dipotso tse tharo e le mosebetsi o ngotsweng kapa puisano ya sehlopha. Potso ya 1 e hlahloba tsibo (ho tsoma, ho kga), potso ya 2 e hlahloba kutlwisiso ya mekgwa e mmedi ya bophelo, mme potso ya 3 e lebisa tsepamisong ya CAPS ya kamoo ho lisa ho fetotseng ditjhaba. Ba hopotse hore meloko ya majweng ke tlaleho ya bohlokwa eo re lokelang ho e sireletsa.
